scripts.build:runtimes: npm run compile && vite build runtime/react && vite build runtime/vue && vite build runtime/svelte && vite build runtime/solid
scripts.build:button: npm run compile:button && vite build runtime/button/react && vite build runtime/button/vue && vite build runtime/button/svelte && vite build runtime/button/solid
scripts.build:dialog: npm run compile:dialog && vite build runtime/dialog/react && vite build runtime/dialog/vue && vite build runtime/dialog/svelte && vite build runtime/dialog/solid && node scripts/publish-runtime-family.mjs dialog
scripts.deploy:prepare: npm run build:runtimes && npm run catalog:build
scripts.proof:select: npm run build:runtimes && node proof/select-proof.mjs && npm pack --dry-run --ignore-scripts && npm run catalog:validate
scripts.proof:button: npm run build:button && node proof/button-proof.mjs && npm pack --dry-run --ignore-scripts && npm run catalog:validate
scripts.proof:dialog: npm run build:dialog && node proof/dialog-proof.mjs && npm pack --dry-run --ignore-scripts && npm run catalog:validate
scripts.test: npm run test:workflow && npm run proof:select && npm run proof:button && npm run proof:dialog && npm run proof:popover
scripts.build:native-controls: npm run compile:native-controls && vite build runtime/checkbox/react && vite build runtime/checkbox/vue && vite build runtime/checkbox/svelte && vite build runtime/checkbox/solid && vite build runtime/switch/react && vite build runtime/switch/vue && vite build runtime/switch/svelte && vite build runtime/switch/solid
scripts.proof:native-controls: npm run build:native-controls && node proof/native-control-proof.mjs && npm pack --dry-run --ignore-scripts && npm run catalog:validate
scripts.build:popover: npm run compile:popover && vite build runtime/popover/react && vite build runtime/popover/vue && vite build runtime/popover/svelte && vite build runtime/popover/solid && node scripts/publish-runtime-family.mjs popover
scripts.proof:popover: npm run build:popover && node proof/popover-proof.mjs && npm pack --dry-run --ignore-scripts && npm run catalog:validate
scripts.directory:validate: npm --prefix astro run build && node scripts/validate-directory.mjs
scripts.build:form: npm run compile:form && for c in field input input-group input-area sensitive-input clipboard-text; do for f in react vue svelte solid; do vite build runtime/$c/$f || exit 1; done; done && node scripts/form-index.mjs
scripts.proof:form: npm run build:form && node proof/form-proof.mjs && npm pack --dry-run --ignore-scripts && npm run catalog:validate
scripts.build:navigation: npm run compile:navigation && for c in tabs menu-bar sidebar breadcrumbs table-of-contents; do for f in react vue svelte solid; do vite build runtime/$c/$f || exit 1; done; done
scripts.proof:navigation: npm run build:navigation && node proof/navigation-proof.mjs && npm pack --dry-run --ignore-scripts && npm run catalog:validate
scripts.build:kumo:svelte: npm run compile:kumo:svelte && for c in select button dialog popover checkbox switch field input input-group input-area sensitive-input clipboard-text tabs menu-bar sidebar breadcrumbs table-of-contents badge banner surface layer-card grid grid-item loader meter empty label link text cloudflare-logo code table radio autocomplete combobox command-palette date-picker date-range-picker dropdown-menu toasty pagination; do vite build runtime/$c/svelte || exit 1; done
scripts.proof:kumo:svelte: npm run build:kumo:svelte && npm run verify:kumo:svelte && npm pack --dry-run --ignore-scripts && npm run catalog:validate
scripts.build:data-presentational: npm run compile:data-presentational && for c in badge banner surface layer-card grid grid-item loader meter empty label link text cloudflare-logo code table; do for f in react vue svelte solid; do vite build runtime/$c/$f || exit 1; done; done
scripts.proof:data-presentational: npm run build:data-presentational && node proof/data-presentational-proof.mjs && npm pack --dry-run --ignore-scripts && npm run catalog:validate
scripts.build:selection-command-date: npm run compile:selection-command-date && for c in radio autocomplete combobox command-palette date-picker date-range-picker dropdown-menu toasty pagination; do vite build runtime/$c/vue || exit 1; done
scripts.proof:selection-command-date: npm run build:selection-command-date && npm run verify:kumo:vue && npm pack --dry-run --ignore-scripts && npm run catalog:validate
